The ChatGPT API gives developers access: The ChatGPT API gives developers access to OpenAI flagship models, covering the GPT-5.6 Sol, GPT-5.6 Luna, and GPT Image 2 tiers. Each tier offers chat, vision, and image generation variants, delivering accurate text rendering and stable results across a wide range of styles and creative workflows.
The Gemini API brings Google DeepMind mu: The Gemini API brings Google DeepMind multimodal model family to developers, spanning the Pro, Flash, and Flash-Lite tiers. Each tier balances reasoning depth, image understanding, and cost, making it easy to match long-context analysis, image generation, and high-throughput product scenarios.
The Grok API provides developers with xA: The Grok API provides developers with xAI real-time model lineup, including the Grok Imagine image and video generation series. Each tier supports text-to-image and text-to-video variants, tuned for live prompts, rapid iteration, and up-to-date responses in fast-moving conversations.
The Claude API offers Anthropic model fa: The Claude API offers Anthropic model family for developers, covering the Fable, Opus, and Sonnet tiers. Each tier provides long-context chat and analysis variants, excelling at clear reasoning, dependable writing, and planning tasks over large documents and codebases.
The DeepSeek API delivers an efficient o: The DeepSeek API delivers an efficient open-model family for developers, including the V4 Pro, V4 Flash, and V3.2 tiers. Each tier offers chat and code-focused variants, providing strong reasoning and coding quality at a highly competitive cost for production workloads.
The MiniMax API opens up a versatile mul: The MiniMax API opens up a versatile multimodal model family, covering the M3, M2.7, and M2.7 High-Speed tiers. Each tier provides text, speech, and visual generation variants, fitting content creation, voice applications, and interactive experiences with flexible speed and quality trade-offs.
The GLM API brings Zhipu AI bilingual mo: The GLM API brings Zhipu AI bilingual model family to developers, spanning the GLM-5.2, GLM-5.1, and GLM-5 Turbo tiers. Each tier offers chat and tool-use variants with strong Chinese and English understanding, built for real-world applications from customer service to agent workflows.
